user.title: Add a Cuby device
user.description: Enter the Cuby device ID (visible on the Cuby app or printed on the device). The device must be publishing to your MQTT broker on the cuby/[device-id]/... topics.

abort.already_configured: This Cuby device is already set up.
abort.mqtt_required: The Home Assistant MQTT integration must be configured before adding a Cuby device.

init.title: Cuby options
init.description: Choose which optional entities to expose for this device.
